title: Cookies & Campfires
description: The cutest and coziest modpack you've ever been given
body:
![Cookies&Campfires v1.0 Baner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/213449cefc00a63e30091617392861ac9b7f1b6d_0.webp)

## 🍪Cookies & Campfires

A cosy, atmospheric and visually rich Minecraft modpack.

Cookies & Campfires is a carefully crafted modpack with heavy focuses on comfort, aesthetics, exploration, and peaceful gameplay.

It's designed for players who want to live in their Minecraft world, not rush through progression or grind endlessly.

The pack combines modern performance optimization, rich and immersive visuals, deep decoration, and softly integrated Create, all while preserving a strong vanilla feel.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cea055ae9ce9dbdaa96753bca3e63d4fbc63aed4.png)

The world of Cookies & Campfires feels warm, alive, and richly detailed:
- Advanced clouds, waves, rain, and particle effects
- Smooth animations, emotes, expressive characters, and item animations
- Improved mobs, villagers, traders, golems, and wildlife
- Cozy lighting, campfires, and then some very subtle environmental details.
Every biome feels alive, and the exploration is relaxing and immersive.

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c2a75fbf73638169820e5bec6e14e94539a04f6.png)
This modpack emphasizes home, detail, and atmosphere:
- A wide range of furniture and decorative blocks
- Character customization and posing armor stand
- Animated paintings and interactive decorative elements
Countless small details, which make the world feel lived in. It's perfect for building cozy bases, villages, and places with a fantasy theme.

![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1178fa040d2955106b49dc35489495f6e40c51fe.png)
The technical aspect is related to “Create and its add-ons:”
- The machines are aesthetically pleasing and user-friendly
- Automation feels creative rather than mandatory
- No heavy or complex tech mods

Create is employed as a creativity tool and not as hardcore progress.

![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/207351276a7fd4bf9d354e88119051fd1ce5417c.png)

- Increased world generation, detailed structures
- More biodiverse habitats and landscapes
- New creatures and world events
- Convenient travel and storage options

Exploration is satisfying but not stressful.

![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f428c1bf72e144eb2c58df87d116babcd62f1be.png)

Cookies & Campfires is extremely optimized for:

- Sodium, Lithium, Iris, FerriteCore, ModernFix
- Smooth UI, enhanced animations, and configurable visuals
- Fast loading times and stable FPS

Designed specifically for long term survival worlds. PC support: low to mid-range.
![6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/984ff16c8d03af5ee89fd5084209d065cef1a487.png)

- ✔ players who enjoy survival games
- ✔ builders and decorators
- ✔ visual and immersion-focused players
- ✔ Relaxed solo play or small friendly servers 

> "Cookies & Campfires" – it’s a Minecraft you want to return to in the evening – make a cup of tea, a campfire to sit around and a world to relax in.


![7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57547edf897a80c715d5ac64c55f4919648e3ba1.png)
![gallery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf32b4f995a914b8e0cb12963d9c593ab7a2d0ec.png)

![8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/207351276a7fd4bf9d354e88119051fd1ce5417c.png)
Crafted with cookies on the table, sparks in the air, and a deep love for cozy Minecraft.
May your nights be calm, your builds comfy, and your pumpkins friendly.
